name: career-command-center
description: A macOS application and Codex workflow for evidence-led job discovery, application tracking, and tailored CV generation.

interface.shortDescription: Find, tailor, and track career applications.
interface.longDescription: Guides evidence intake, organizes job and PhD opportunities, builds role-family master CVs, creates tailored application packages, and keeps configurable Codex searches synchronized with a native macOS command center. Career documents and application state remain in a workspace chosen by the user.
defaultPrompt: Run my targeted career search now.
